## Related Issue
Please link the issue here (e.g., Fixes #123)

## Description of Changes
A brief description of what this PR introduces or fixes.

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots to visually explain the changes.

## Testing Performed
- [ ] Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.
- [ ] List any relevant details for your test configuration.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes.
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules.

## ELUSOC Compliance Confirmation
- [ ] I have been officially assigned to the related issue.
- [ ] This PR targets the `elusoc` branch.
- [ ] I have resolved all merge conflicts before submitting.
- [ ] I have followed the ELUSOC 2026 contribution guidelines.
